sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, vertices Array(Array((Float64, Float64))));
SELECT id, polygonAreaCartesian(vertices) AS area FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE polygons SET vertices = [[(1., 1.), (1., 4.), (4., 4.), (4., 1.)]] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, polygonAreaCartesian(vertices) AS area FROM polygons WHERE area > 0;
